config.raw:
# System Configuration
# General system settings

system:
  name: Agentic Security System
  version: 1.0.0
  environment: development

logging:
  level: INFO
  format: json
  output: console

inference:
  batch_size: 32
  timeout: 30
  retry_attempts: 3

storage:
  data_dir: ./data
  model_dir: ./models
  log_dir: ./logs

monitoring:
  poll_interval: 1
  recursive: true
  console_reporting: true
  file_watch_paths:
    - ${USERPROFILE}\Documents
    - ${USERPROFILE}\Desktop
    - .\demo_shared
config.thresholds:
# Threshold Configuration
# Decision thresholds for anomaly detection

anomaly_thresholds:
  process:
    low: 0.3
    medium: 0.6
    high: 0.8
  
  file:
    low: 0.3
    medium: 0.6
    high: 0.8
  
  network:
    low: 0.3
    medium: 0.6
    high: 0.8

ensemble_threshold: 0.5
alert_threshold: 0.7
config.modelConfig:
# Model Configuration
# Settings for training and inference models

process_model:
  isolation_forest:
    contamination: 0.1
    n_estimators: 100
  xgboost:
    max_depth: 6
    learning_rate: 0.1
    n_estimators: 100

file_model:
  catboost:
    max_depth: 6
    learning_rate: 0.1
    iterations: 100

network_model:
  isolation_forest:
    contamination: 0.1
    n_estimators: 100
  xgboost:
    max_depth: 6
    learning_rate: 0.1
    n_estimators: 100

aggregator_model:
  xgboost:
    max_depth: 6
    learning_rate: 0.1
    n_estimators: 100

        self.process_collector = ProcessCollector(interval=interval)
        self.file_collector = FileCollector(path=file_watch_paths or ".", recursive=file_watch_recursive)

risks.title: Duplicate main guards in main.py
risks.evidence: main.py defines two __main__ blocks and two startup paths.

risks.title: Deployment can vault and replace real files
risks.evidence: DeploymentManager._materialize_file moves existing targets into .aads_vault before writing decoys.
